prompt: The old lighthouse keeper climbed the spiral stairs, and
text:
looked out over the sea. He was a tall, thin man, with a long, white beard, and a face that was weather-beaten and lined with wrinkles. He had been keeping the lighthouse for many years, and he knew every inch of the coast. He had seen many ships come and go, and he had heard many stories from sailors who had visited the island.
 The venerable lighthouse keeper ascended the winding staircase, his gaze sweeping across the vast expanse of the sea. Towering and slender, with a distinguished white beard and a visage etched with the marks of time, he had dedicated decades to the guard
